$comment: edit_file: apply a change to an EXISTING Go file in a persistent workspace. Reads the file's exact current contents + the module state, regenerates the whole file per the request, then go vet + go test the WHOLE module (stage_check), repairs once, and logs the edit. Operator-facing: `ratchet flow . edit_file --ws <proj> "<path> <request>"`; $input splits into path + request. proj = $workspace.
summary: Apply a change to an existing Go file in a workspace; grounded on its current contents, verified with go vet + go test, repaired once, logged.
